---
title: "Calculate PRS with PLINK2"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Overview

This notebook calculates a polygenic risk score (PRS) from a prepared score
file using PLINK 2 and standardizes the resulting scores.

## Required files

- PLINK 2 executable
  - https://www.cog-genomics.org/plink/2.0/
- Target genotype dataset (`.pgen`, `.pvar`, `.psam`)
- Score file created with `Create_Scorefiles_hg38_flipped.Rmd`

# Load libraries

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(stringr)
```

# User settings

```{r}
project_dir <- "path/to/project"

plink2 <- "path/to/plink2"

file <- "PGS003356"

genotype_prefix <- file.path(
  project_dir,
  "path",
  "to",
  "genotype_data"
)

scorefile <- file.path(
  project_dir,
  "LIFE_PRS",
  paste0(file, "_scorefile.txt")
)

output_prefix <- file.path(
  project_dir,
  "LIFE_PRS",
  paste0(file, "_output")
)
```

# Calculate PRS using PLINK2

```{r}
system(glue(
  '{plink2} ',
  '--pfile {genotype_prefix} ',
  '--score {scorefile} 1 2 3 header ',
  'list-variants cols=+scoresums ',
  '--out {output_prefix}'
))
```

# Standardize PRS

```{r}
prs <- read_table(glue("{output_prefix}.sscore"))

prs$SCORE_standardized <- as.numeric(
  scale(prs$SCORE1_SUM)
)

prs_out <- prs %>%
  select(
    IID,
    SCORE_standardized
  )

write_tsv(
  prs_out,
  glue("{output_prefix}_standardized.tsv")
)
```
